raw_consumer_statement: I made a reservation through XXXX on this card. I later then remembered I used this card, had previously called and closed the account paying the balance off XX/XX/XXXX for XXXX. I then a few days later XX/XX/XXXX, cancelled the XXXX  and they refunded the money for the reservation back to the card I had closed. I began trying to contact the credit card company and XXXX rep did say they saw the refund as " pending '' but I would have to call back in XXXX business days and try and request a refund. I said I have to call back? You wont just issue a refund based on the account being closed and an overpayment occurring. The rep said no call back in about XXXX weeks. I did and it took actually calling periodically for XXXX weeks to actually get a human on the phone at which time they told me that a check request would be issued for the balance of XXXX I asked why is not for the XXXX that was refunded and I guess there is some charge. OK, so I waited the XXXX weeks they told me it would take to get the check, never happened. So I called back the XXXX of XXXX and was told that an ACH could be done, so I gave my account number and routing number ( which now I am thinking why did I do that?! ) Anyway was told to wait XXXX days for it to deposit and there has been absolutely no refund. I have tried to call this company at least XXXX  times to wait on hold and get disconnected. The company is XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX
